name: Corky Hale
abstract: Corky Hale (born July 3, 1936) is an American jazz harpist, pianist, flutist, and vocalist. She has been a theater producer, political activist, restaurateur, and the owner of the Corky Hale women's clothing store in Los Angeles, California.

about_quotes.evidence: But on this particular show we did -- I did, just with her, 'If I Had a Ribbon Bow.'
